H

handle(ClientRequest, ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.AuthController
Handles authentication and registration requests.
handle(ClientRequest, ClientSession) - Method in interface server.control.DomainController
Handles one request and produces the response to send back.
handle(ClientRequest, ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.NotificationController
Processes notification requests for the currently logged-in actor.
handle(ClientRequest, ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.ParkController
Processes park management and parameter-change requests.
handle(ClientRequest, ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.ReportController
Processes report requests for a department manager.
handle(ClientRequest, ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Processes reservation and waiting-list requests.
handle(ClientRequest, ClientSession) - Method in class server.control.VisitController
Processes visit and occupancy requests.
handle(ClientRequest, ClientSession) - Method in class server.net.RequestRouter
Dispatches one request: handles the infrastructure ops (PING / SUBSCRIBE / UNSUBSCRIBE) inline and routes every domain op to its registered controller.
handleClient(Socket, String, String) - Method in class server.net.OrderServer
Per-client handler thread: reads requests in a loop until disconnect, dispatching each through the router and writing the response, with per-request failure containment and session/lock cleanup on teardown.
handledTypes() - Method in class server.control.AuthController
Returns the request types handled by this controller.
handledTypes() - Method in interface server.control.DomainController
The set of operation types this controller is responsible for.

Returns the notification-related request types handled by this controller.

Returns the request types handled by this controller.

Returns the report-related request types handled by this controller.
handledTypes() - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Returns the reservation-related request types handled by this controller.
handledTypes() - Method in class server.control.VisitController
Returns the visit-related request types handled by this controller.
